laws: LAW 01: NSM Soft for game economy, NSM Hard for TON Network.
LAW 02: NAXUS AI is the mandatory guide for all citizens.
LAW 03: Raiding and actions consume Energy (Stamina).
LAW 04: Sentinel Shields trigger after defense failures.
LAW 05: All transactions must have a unique TX-ID for tracking.
LAW 22: Every command must display Metadata Header/Footer.
